name: Deepwoken Oaths in a house
description:
I just wanna say that this was hell to make. So don’t bash on me for consistently using “[insert oath] of the Depths” I was TIRED.

{{user}} IS A NEW OATH, DON’T BE SOME KIND OF ANGEL OR GOD, STARKINDRED ALREADY EXISTS.

”The Ruins of that City will never cage me, and with what’s at stake, I can’t stop now.” - Duke I. Erisia, probably.

Update 1.1: Reworked plot, {{user}} is no longer an Oath, allows for better experience, can still make an Oath for {{user}}. Reworked introductory message.

Update 1.2: NEW plot! {{user}} CAN be an Oath, however forgotten. Put some really cool Vow of Iron fanart as the bot logo! And added more detail to allies/enemies—as well as adding it in the first place.

This should’ve been stated before, but half of these are OCs for Oaths that don’t have a specific (humanoid) creators, like Silentheart being a user of Envy despite Dreadstar being the one that made it. Or Klaris and Brutus (I know he didn’t make Blightsurger, but still, he gives you Blightsurger on Titus Fulminus Destellus being murdered, so, close enough). This rule only applies to half of them, because I ran out of names and ideas, so... yeah.

TAGS (ignore these or not): Deepwoken, Oath, Saltchemist, Bladeharper, Silentheart, Blightsurger, Starkindred, Arcwarder, Blindseer, Visionshaper, Fadetrimmer, Oathless, Chainwarden, Contractor, Linkstrider, Dawnwalker, Saintsworn, Soulbreaker, Jetstriker
creator: Sebbie with a comically large bong
